name: StraightDimension
summary: The StraightDimension class defines straight dimensions.

constructors.name: StraightDimension(ViewBase, Point, Point, Vector, Double)
constructors.signature: public StraightDimension(ViewBase targetView, Point startPoint, Point endPoint, Vector upDirection, double distance)
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of the StraightDimension class using "standard" attributes.

params.name: targetView
params.doc: The target view of the dimension.

params.name: startPoint
params.doc: The start point of the dimension.

params.name: endPoint
params.doc: The end point of the dimension.

params.name: upDirection
params.doc: The up direction.

params.name: distance
params.doc: The height of the dimension.

constructors.name: StraightDimension(ViewBase, Point, Point, Vector, Double, StraightDimensionSet.StraightDimensionSetAttributes)
constructors.signature: public StraightDimension(ViewBase targetView, Point startPoint, Point endPoint, Vector upDirection, double distance, StraightDimensionSet.StraightDimensionSetAttributes attributes)
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of the StraightDimension class.

params.doc: The target view of the dimension.

params.name: endPoint
params.doc: The end point of the dimension.

params.name: upDirection
params.doc: The up direction.

params.name: distance
params.doc: The height of the dimension.

params.name: attributes
params.doc: The dimension attributes.

methods.name: GetUserProperty(String, Double.)
methods.signature: public bool GetUserProperty(string Name, ref double Value)
methods.summary: Gets a double property from the drawing object. The object has to be in a drawing before the method can be used.

properties.name: Attributes
properties.summary: Gets or sets the dimension's attributes.

properties.name: Distance
properties.summary: Gets or sets the distance of the dimension line from the start point of the dimension.

properties.name: EndPoint
properties.summary: Gets or sets the end point of the dimension.

properties.name: Hideable
properties.summary: Accesses the information if this object is hidden or not or if it should be.

properties.name: QueryReturnValue
properties.summary: Status information about the latest database operation (select, insert, modify, delete).

properties.name: StartPoint
properties.summary: Gets or sets the start point of the dimension.

properties.name: UpDirection
properties.summary: Gets or sets the direction from the dimension points to the dimension line.

properties.name: Value
properties.summary: Gets the content of the dimension mark.
